name: PreReqIdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlSkSet

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_input AS (SELECT MAX(RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_SK) AS RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL), cte_output AS (SELECT CASE WHEN cte_input.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_SK IS NULL THEN 10000 ELSE cte_input.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_SK + 1 END AS RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_SK FROM cte_input) SELECT * FROM cte_output

Description:
Called By: FacetsBCBSRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlCntl


Process Description: Extract Data from IDS (RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL)

Annotations:
IDS Received Income Subsidy Detail Primary Key Set
This job will create the next Key that will be used in subsequent steps

Since RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL is loaded from multiple source systems; we will need to SYNC data between the Hash file and K table. This job will need to be run until we convert all the Server jobs that are using hash files for above 3 tables.
